---
title: 'Email to Jack'
date: '2014-01-16T03:47:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2141571306569846110'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/email-to-jack.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<div>
Recap of today. </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
Today's meeting with you was great, I really want to digg into that 
breaking the yoke through restlessness concept. I didn't tell you but I showed 
up at 7am so I was there for prayer too, and that was great too. I thought hard 
about what he said about writers block disappearing as a vapor, about what you 
said about me being a writer. </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
I talked with Flavia before I went to the interview, sometimes it feels 
scary to have the potential of doing something because of what it means if it 
works and what it means if it doesn't. She reminded me of this HORRIBLE 
interview I had once that solidified once and for all for me that I am NOT a 
police officer! Which really helped free me because for years I said maybe I 
should be a police officer. It was as though the idea of&nbsp;being one, was more 
powerful than&nbsp;actually becoming one because&nbsp;I took NO action toward it. lol. 
</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
Well I went to the interview today and decided once and for all, I am NOT 
an audio engineer (A technical person who deals with gear and hardware, more 
than software, set up and such). I AM an audio mixer and audio musician, but not 
an engineer. Working hard to put equipment up and then tear it down for some 
group to come in and hold a conference and then doing it all over again, working 
50-70 hour weeks for less than $50K,&nbsp;is not in my DNA. I am a creator, first and 
foremost. My version of audio would have me walk in and mix for a church 
meeting, or sit in my office and mix music to post online, not set up "gigs". 
</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
I feel free because I've been torn between multiple visions of what I need 
to be trying to do or become in 2014 and now I can put one to rest for sure. 
Music is something I will continue to work on, but my immediate future involves 
me and a keyboard (typing kind). In fact I'm not registering for audio 
102.</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
I AM A WRITER. THAT is my word for 2014. WRITE. I will dive in head first 
to writing. Blogs, maybe work on a book, turn my blogs into profit centers 
instead of just cost centers, and make a living as a writer. That is my vision 
for 2014. You and Your friend combined with several other moments before today 
and during today solidified that vision. In fact one of the first things I 
thought about is how I can become more focused on making Texas Living (the 
review blog) more official and follow it with more purpose. I thought of Chamber 
of Commerce, although I think that will be a second half of 2014 thing after I 
prove to myself I can post regularly and build content. Flavia and I even asked 
ourselves what kind of income we can expect from a project like that and we both 
said if nothing else maybe free food as invites to review more. </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
Well, we went to Pei Wei today on a whim and the District Manager was 
there. The Assist Store manager bought us an appetizer because my mom was new to 
Pei Wei and he said we HAD to try it! While I was waiting for everyone to get 
back from the restroom I chatted with the DM for a while. Then the DM came over 
and talked to us more later and gave me four gift cards to use to come back 
because I talked so highly of the place.&nbsp;That's when I told him I was also a 
review blogger and would be sure to post about today. We chatted and he gave me 
his card. I left feeling that God had confirmed that I'm on the right track. 
First the leaf... </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
What a weird and cool day. ...</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
Thank you for being there. You are an inspiration, friend, and 
father-figure-in-faith. Darrell</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
PS: I know you know Michael Hyatt. </div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
This guy is very cool too for my field.&nbsp;Patt Flynn talks about many things 
related to online business. I don't know how much you would benefit personally, 
but I have a feeling you are going to run into someone who needs&nbsp;this link. &nbsp;<a href="http://www.smartpassiveincome.com/">http://www.smartpassiveincome.com</a></div>
<div id="signature">
<div style="font-family: Trebuchet MS; font-size: 12pt;">
<div>
&nbsp;<span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span id="ff062ecb092e49dcaa90ed764cf87dcf"> 
<div>
<span id="4f529bf825cd404dbac15ee9c8c64650">
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><!--?xml:namespace 
prefix = "o" /--><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"></o:o:o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"></o:o:o:p></span></div>
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><span style="font-size: large;">
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background-color: white; color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: large;">Darrell G. 
Wolfe<o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"></o:o:o:p></span></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="background-color: white; color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 0pt;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><span style="color: black; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Blogger,&nbsp;<span style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS'; font-size: 12pt;"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Author</span></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></span>,&nbsp;</span><span style="color: black; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Audio 
Mixer, Musician, Etc.</span></div>
<o:o:o:p style="background-color: white; color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;" xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;">
<div style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS'; font-size: 12pt;">
<div>
<span id="ff062ecb092e49dcaa90ed764cf87dcf">
<div>
<span id="4f529bf825cd404dbac15ee9c8c64650"><o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown">
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><br /></span></span></o:o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/">DarrellWolfe.blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></o:o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span></o:o:p><o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span id="63469b4f348440bab3b1628c741e8b4c"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/">AuthorFun.blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></o:o:o:p></o:o:o:p></o:o:o:p></o:o:o:p></span></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></span></span></o:o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/">TexasLivingInfo.Blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></o:o:o:p></o:o:o:p></o:o:o:p></o:o:o:p></span></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></span></o:o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span></o:o:o:p><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span></o:o:o:p></o:o:o:p></o:o:o:p></o:o:o:p></span></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></o:o:o:o:p></span></o:o:p><o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><span style="color: #0072bc;">Twitter: 
@DarrellWolfe</span></a><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/"><o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"></o:o:p></a></span></o:o:p></div>
<a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/"></a>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"></span></a><a href="mailto:DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com" target="_BLANK"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;">DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com</span></span></a></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<img alt="" border="0" src="" /></div>
</o:o:p></o:o:p></o:o:p></span></div>
</span></div>
</div>
</span></span></span></o:o:o:p></span></span></span></div>
</span></span></div>
</div>
<br /><br /><span style="color: #6a6a6a; font-size: 70%;">__________________________________<br />Sent 
from eM Client | <a href="http://www.emclient.com/get">www.emclient.com</a></span></div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<div>
------ Original Message ------</div>
<div>
From: "Jack Ernest" &lt;<a href="mailto:yexcellence@gmail.com">yexcellence@gmail.com</a>&gt;</div>
<div>
To: "Darrell Wolfe" &lt;<a href="mailto:darrellwolfe@gmail.com">darrellwolfe@gmail.com</a>&gt;</div>
<div>
Sent: 1/14/2014 10:40:58 AM</div>
<div>
Subject: Re: ReSchedule</div>
<div>
&nbsp;</div>
<br />
<div id="02004dc9d9a14248a6f1cce1c60db2ac">
<blockquote cite="msg://33d41aa3-1c90-423a-9dff-080555a9ff64/CAGJz_ZzXLokBxa-jmB-k2Z5csuRUGr1M5-SXhw4Y9NsELg1CeA@mail.gmail.com" class="cite2" type="cite">
<div>
Great, and yes it's a bit more comfortable and coffee is free!!!</div>
<div>
<br /><br />&nbsp;</div>
<div class="gmail_quote">
On Tue, Jan 14, 2014 at 12:30 AM, Darrell Wolfe <span dir="ltr">&lt;<a href="mailto:darrellwolfe@gmail.com">darrellwolfe@gmail.com</a>&gt;</span> 
wrote:<br />
<blockquote class="gmail_quote" style="border-left: #ccc 1px solid; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0.8ex; padding-left: 1ex;">
Let's do nfw gateway campus. Their seating is more comfortable anyway. Wed 
am. 8.00 or when prayer is over.<br />

<div class="HOEnZb">
<div class="h5">
<div class="gmail_quote">
On Jan 13, 2014 4:22 PM, "Jack Ernest" &lt;<a href="mailto:yexcellence@gmail.com">yexcellence@gmail.com</a>&gt; wrote:<br type="attribution" />
<blockquote class="gmail_quote" style="border-left: #ccc 1px solid; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0.8ex; padding-left: 1ex;">
<div dir="ltr">
<div>
<div>
<div>
<div>
Darrell,<br /></div>
Just a thought, there is prayer from 7 - 8 am every 
morning at each of the Gateway campuses.</div>
I've planed on attending each 
morning at the FTW campus; so, can we change the time to 8:30 at Starbucks or 
meet at the Gateway FTW campus, they've got coffee and plenty of meeting 
areas.</div>
Let me know, I'm good both ways.<br /></div>
Jack</div>
<div class="gmail_extra">
<br /><br />
<div class="gmail_quote">
On Sun, Jan 12, 2014 at 9:59 AM, Darrell Wolfe <span dir="ltr">&lt;<a href="mailto:darrellwolfe@gmail.com">darrellwolfe@gmail.com</a>&gt;</span> 
wrote:<br />
<blockquote class="gmail_quote" style="border-left: #ccc 1px solid; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0.8ex; padding-left: 1ex;">
<div dir="ltr">
<div class="gmail_default" style="font-family: georgia,serif;">
<br /></div>
<div class="gmail_default" style="font-family: georgia,serif;">
This Wednesday would 
be OK if you want to try again. How's your week look? Otherwise we can just try 
again in Feb. Either way is fine. Let me know.&nbsp;</div>
<div class="gmail_default" style="font-family: georgia,serif;">
<br /></div>
<div class="gmail_default" style="font-family: georgia,serif;">
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
-- <br />
<div dir="ltr">
<br />
<div>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: large;">Darrell G. 
Wolfe</span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Blogger,&nbsp;<span style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Author</span></span>,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Audio Mixer, Musician, 
Etc.</span></div>
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;">
<div style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS'; font-size: 12pt;">
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/">DarrellWolfe.blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/">AuthorFun.blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/">TexasLivingInfo.Blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span></span></span><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><span style="color: #0072bc;">Twitter: 
@DarrellWolfe</span></a><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/"></a></span></div>
<a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/"></a>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"></span></a><a href="mailto:DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;">DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com</span></span></a></div>
</div>
</span></span></span></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/email-signature-b8f38f5e2122.jpg" /></div>
</div>
</div>
</blockquote>
</div>
</div>
</blockquote>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</blockquote>
</div>
</blockquote>
</div>
